name: csn-minimal-generator
description: Generate minimal CSN Interop v1.0 from database schemas matching SAP BDC Connect SDK output format
whenToUse: When publishing Snowflake tables to SAP Datasphere/BDC and maximum compatibility is required. Generates CSN v1.0 with minimal annotations matching SDK format.
whenNotToUse: When building CSN for SAP CAP applications, or when comprehensive semantic annotations are needed
capabilities: Generate CSN Interop v1.0 from Snowflake
Map Snowflake types to CDS types (Snowflake -> Iceberg -> CSN)
author: Amit Tapas & Kevin Poskitt
